AgnesTextToVideo.description: Generate video from text using Agnes-Video-V2.0 model. Control video length by duration (seconds), automatically adapt to API frame constraints. Need to configure API Key in ComfyUI settings.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.tooltip: Text description of the video content

negative_prompt.name: negative_prompt
negative_prompt.tooltip: Negative prompt, describing content to avoid

duration_seconds.name: duration_seconds
duration_seconds.tooltip: Desired video duration (seconds), actual duration may be slightly adjusted

seed.name: seed
seed.tooltip: Random seed, -1 for random. Fixed seed for reproducible results

num_inference_steps.name: num_inference_steps
num_inference_steps.tooltip: Number of inference steps, higher is better quality but slower

0.name: frames
0.tooltip: Generated video frame sequence (RGB images), shape [N, H, W, C]

1.name: audio
1.tooltip: Audio data from the video (None if no audio), contains waveform and sample_rate
